JONES IN THE FAST LANE
F1 - Help - This screen
F2 - Music on/off 
F3 - Sound Effects on/off 
F4 - Current Player's Statistics 
F5 - Saves the current game
F6 - View Goals Screens
F7 - Restores the saved game
F8 - Non-essential messages on/off
F9 - Restarts the game
F10- About Jones

JONES IN THE FAST LANE
Ctrl-Q - Quit
Ctrl-R - Change Reading Speed
Ctrl-S - Change Speed
Ctrl-T - Set Graphics Detail Level
Ctrl-V - Change Volume
Ctrl-Y - Set Save Directory
Ctrl-Z - Delete a Player
Esc   - Menu Bar/Pauses Game
Left Mouse - Select
Middle Mouse/CTRL-Left - Goals
Right Mouse/SHIFT-Left - Statistics
